items.name_en: [Size Change Chip Version] Model: M12099 Small This piece 🔥 double-sided use Legendary Neverfull BB: always meets your tote needs. Spacious yet not bulky, structured yet soft, suitable for home or travel. Tighten side ties to instantly transform into a chic city bag. Loosen ties to become a unique and practical handbag. Long leather handle is suitable for shoulder or arm carry. Shown here in Damier Azur canvas.

items.name_en: [Size Change Chip Version] Model: M12109 Small This style is double-sided and highly versatile. A legendary Neverfull BB bag that always meets your tote needs. Spacious yet not bulky, structured yet soft, perfect for home or travel. Tighten the side drawstrings to instantly transform into a chic city bag. items.name_en: [Variant Chip Version] Model: M46839 💯 This OnTheGo BB tote bag features a design inspired by the original, crafted with Monogram canvas and Monogram Reverse canvas for the leather handles and handle attachments.
